summary.zh: 沿明确方向引入内容，让新元素与界面空间关系保持清楚。
summary.en: Bring content in from a clear direction so its spatial relationship stays legible.

definition.zh: 元素从屏幕外沿左、右、上或下方滑入。
definition.en: A positional transition moves content from beyond an edge into its resting location.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制动效开始前的等待时间。
description.en: Controls the wait before motion begins.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 通过移动方向解释内容来自哪里，以及它与现有布局的空间关系。
purpose.en: Use direction to explain where content came from and how it relates spatially to the current layout.

frequency.zh: 适合低到中频的抽屉、面板和分层导航；高频反馈应改用更短的淡入。
frequency.en: Use for low- to medium-frequency drawers, panels, and layered navigation; prefer shorter fades for frequent feedback.

trigger.zh: 由打开面板、添加内容或进入下一级导航触发，方向与信息来源一致。
trigger.en: Trigger when opening a panel, adding content, or entering deeper navigation, with direction matching the source.

enterExit.zh: 进入沿来源方向移动到位；离开沿相反路径返回，并保持退出目标明确。
enterExit.en: Enter from the source direction; exit along the reverse path with a clear destination.

interruptibility.zh: 反向操作应从当前位置接管并立刻改向，禁止等待上一段完成。
interruptibility.en: A reversing action takes over at the current position and changes direction immediately.

gestureRules.zh: 拖拽式面板要让位移跟随指针，并在阈值后结算；按钮打开的面板保持点击与键盘等价。
gestureRules.en: Gesture-driven panels follow the pointer and settle after a threshold; button-opened panels keep click and keyboard parity.

reducedMotion.zh: 移除大幅位移，仅保留短淡入和清晰的层级边界。
reducedMotion.en: Remove large travel and keep a short fade with a clear layer boundary.

reviewNotes.zh: 检查进入方向与触发控件的位置关系。
reviewNotes.en: Check that the entry direction matches the trigger's position.

reviewNotes.zh: 确保离场结束后焦点回到合理位置。
reviewNotes.en: Return focus to a sensible location after exit completes.
